hooks.command: $json = $input | Out-String; $parsed = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $parsed.tool_input.file_path; if ($file -and ($file -match '\bads\b' -or $file -match '/ads/' -or $file -match '\\ads\\')) { $projectRoot = 'C:\\Users\\celeb\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Claude Code\\MEHRWERTFILM FINAL'; $validateScript = Join-Path $projectRoot 'tools\validate.ps1'; $relFile = $file.Replace($projectRoot + '\', ''); Set-Location $projectRoot; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $validateScript $relFile 2>$null } else { exit 0 }
